channel.title: Docs on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in Docs on Drupal WxT

item.title: Theme Workflow
item.description: Sub-themes are just like any other theme, with one difference: They inherit the parent theme’s resources. There are no limits on the chaining capabilities connecting sub-themes for their parents. A sub-theme can be a child of another sub-theme, and it can be branched and organized however you see fit. Background Drupal WxT includes WxT Bootstrap which is a a modern, component based and accessible sub-theme powered by the Bootstrap base theme.
